hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,re,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','additionalContext':'graphify: a code knowledge graph exists at graphify-out/. Prefer: graphify query <question> (or path/explain) for a scoped subgraph instead of grepping raw files; read GRAPH_REPORT.md only for broad architecture.'}})) if (os.path.isfile('graphify-out/graph.json') and re.search(r'(?:^|[\s|&;])(?:grep|egrep|fgrep|rg|ripgrep|ag|ack|fd|find)\b', c)) else None" 2>/dev/null || true
